documentation_commit_message: docs: capture tactical resize reflow validation
comparison_base_assumption: Used commit 22010b9b51c906f68dbd5ead9ffeaa82b37d3df2, the direct parent of implementation commit 3a23aa7ac113512688b14af7f277d6caf362d834, as the safest story-specific base because it is the last commit before this tactical lower-panel resize/reflow change begins on the stacked branch.
documentation_decision: Updated the existing tactical docs instead of creating new ones: `doc/UsersGuide.md` now records the user-visible immediate lower-panel reflow during live resize, and `doc/DesignNotes.md` now captures the deterministic resize/reflow helper seams plus the tester-validated results. No tactical rules document or repository-wide guidance update was needed because the change stayed localized to tactical layout behavior.
